ast.name: error
ast.source: LinkPreview API key is not 32 characters long, please check your settings
ast.target: LinkPreview API 密钥长度不是 32 个字符，请检查您的设置

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在加载 obsidian-auto-link-title

ast.name: log
ast.source: Title via Link Preview failed, falling back to scraper
ast.target: 通过 Link Preview 获取标题失败，回退到抓取器

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在使用新抓取器

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在使用旧抓取器

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在卸载 obsidian-auto-link-title

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Fetch the link title when pasting a link in the editor with the default paste command
ast.target: 使用默认粘贴命令在编辑器中粘贴链接时获取链接标题

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Fetch the link title when drag and dropping a link from another program
ast.target: 从其他程序拖放链接时获取链接标题

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the maximum length of the title. Set to 0 to disable.
ast.target: 设置标题的最大长度。设置为 0 以禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to prefer selected text as title over fetched title when pasting
ast.target: 粘贴时是否优先使用选中的文本作为标题，而不是获取的标题

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: List of strings (comma separated) that disable autocompleting website titles. Can be URLs or arbitrary text.
ast.target: 禁用自动补全网站标题的字符串列表（逗号分隔）。可以是URL或任意文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use a more readable placeholder when fetching the title of a link.
ast.target: 获取链接标题时使用更易读的占位符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: API key for the LinkPreview.net service. Get one at https://my.linkpreview.net/access_keys
ast.target: LinkPreview.net服务的API密钥。请在 https://my.linkpreview.net/access_keys 获取。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 增强默认粘贴

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 增强拖放事件

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 最大标题长度

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 保留选中内容作为标题

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 网站黑名单

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 使用新抓取器

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 使用更好的获取占位符

ast.name: setName
ast.target: LinkPreview API 密钥

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: localhost, tiktok.com

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: LinkPreview API key must be 32 characters long
ast.target: LinkPreview API 密钥长度必须为 32 个字符

ast.name: name
ast.source: Paste URL and auto fetch title
ast.target: 粘贴 URL 并自动获取标题

ast.name: name
ast.target: 普通粘贴（无获取行为）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Enhance existing URL with link and title
ast.target: 为现有 URL 增强链接和标题

regex.source: setDesc("Fetch the link title when pasting a link in the editor with the default paste command")
regex.target: setDesc("Fetch the link title when pasting a link in the editor with the default paste command")

regex.source: setDesc("Fetch the link title when drag and dropping a link from another program")
regex.target: setDesc("Fetch the link title when drag and dropping a link from another program")

regex.source: setDesc("Set the maximum length of the title. Set to 0 to disable.")
regex.target: setDesc("Set the maximum length of the title. Set to 0 to disable.")

regex.source: setDesc("Whether to prefer selected text as title over fetched title when pasting")
regex.target: setDesc("Whether to prefer selected text as title over fetched title when pasting")

regex.source: setDesc("List of strings (comma separated) that disable autocompleting website titles. Can be URLs or arbitrary text.")
regex.target: setDesc("List of strings (comma separated) that disable autocompleting website titles. Can be URLs or arbitrary text.")

regex.source: setDesc("Use a more readable placeholder when fetching the title of a link.")
regex.target: setDesc("Use a more readable placeholder when fetching the title of a link.")

regex.source: setDesc("API key for the LinkPreview.net service. Get one at https://my.linkpreview.net/access_keys")
regex.target: setDesc("API key for the LinkPreview.net service. Get one at https://my.linkpreview.net/access_keys")

regex.source: Notice("LinkPreview API key must be 32 characters long")
regex.target: Notice("LinkPreview API key must be 32 characters long")

regex.source: log(`Unable to find text "${pasteId}" in current editor, bailing out; link ${url}`)
regex.target: log(`Unable to find text "${pasteId}" in current editor, bailing out; link ${url}`)

regex.source: error("LinkPreview API key is not 32 characters long, please check your settings")
regex.target: error("LinkPreview API key is not 32 characters long, please check your settings")

regex.source: log("Title via Link Preview failed, falling back to scraper")
regex.target: log("Title via Link Preview failed, falling back to scraper")

regex.target: name: "Paste URL and auto fetch title"
